title: Crop controls, preview summary and reset

implementation.ownership: Threshold and padding update only the canonical GridSplitRecipeV1.crop through the existing Slice controller and host transaction.
implementation.thresholdZero: Zero is the explicit crop-disabled Off sentinel and preserves the G3-01 donor-compatible baseline.
implementation.history: Slider changes stay in a local gesture draft and commit once on pointer, keyboard or blur completion; no-op commits do not create history.
implementation.hostRejection: A rejected host transaction returns false and immediately restores the visual draft, labels, summary and attributes from the authoritative recipe.
implementation.sourceIdentity: A stable transitional identity includes source bytes and metadata, so same-dimension replacements reset instead of hydrating the previous source recipe.
implementation.preview: The summary reports cell count and active settings, while honestly deferring measured reduction until processing.
implementation.reset: Reset commits threshold 0 and padding 0 together and is disabled when unavailable or already at defaults.
implementation.boundary: G3-04 owns hostile OOB, zero-size and huge-padding gates; G6 owns processed reduction and results presentation.

commands: VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 bunx vitest run tests/components/sliceGridInspector.test.tsx tests/hooks/useSliceGridIntegration.test.tsx tests/hooks/useSliceGridController.test.tsx tests/contract/gridRecipeState.test.ts tests/contract/gridProcessingCrop.test.ts tests/contract/gridProcessingGeometry.test.ts tests/contract/gridProcessingReduction.test.ts --reporter=verbose
